title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: Google Cloud Tech livestream featuring Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar demonstrating the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to solve a text adventure game through agent coding.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream walks through building an AI agent with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) that can play and solve a text adventure game. Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar lead the demonstration, applying agent orchestration concepts to a concrete coding task. The framing matters as a hands-on look at how ADK structures an agent to interact with a game environment rather than an abstract overview.
